description.value:
You've gained precise control over where and when your chitinous exoskeleton molts. You can spend a week of downtime to retrain any other ancestry feat.

In addition, you can spend a week of downtime to permanently change your appearance. You retain a roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), but your face shape, coloring, sex, and even distinctive mannerisms change to adapt to your new body type. Changing your appearance gives you a +4 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from recognizing you. You can retrain your ancestry feat and change your appearance at the same time, even if you're using effects like @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Dreaming Potential].
